summary: Sunday had never cared to get "intimate" with anyone before, if he was honest. He had more important things to worry about, like avoiding being a total disappointment to his family and peers. Still, your insistent teasing about his status as a virgin was really starting to piss him off -- so why not hit two birds with one stone by shutting you up for good and losing said virginity?

. . .

a/n: i decided to speedrun the bunny suit sunday bot before i leave for my trip tomorrow!! he's literally taking over my brain he's all i can think about please send help...!

next-up: possible break while on trip!
